title: Exporters: printable PDF study sheets + spaced-repetition (CSV/Anki) deck + open JSON dataset
context: Learners study in different ways; exporters turn the cited item bank into printable PDF study sheets, a spaced-repetition (CSV/Anki) deck, and an open JSON dataset, each carrying the license and non-official labels.
objective: Build exporters producing printable PDFs, a spaced-repetition deck (CSV/Anki), and an open JSON dataset, all preserving license and non-official labeling.
acceptanceCriteria: Printable PDF study sheets, a spaced-repetition (CSV/Anki) deck, and an open JSON dataset all export from the cited item bank
Every export carries the output license and the non-official/non-advice labels
Exports stay in sync with the validated item bank (no uncited or stale items leak)
